examples: Many people soothe their consciences by purchasing only free-range fowl and eggs, blissfully ignorant that "free range" has very little practical significance.
At first, he was blissfully unaware of the conspiracy against him.
Many Japanese investors blissfully ignored rising interest rates in the last two years of the 1980s.
Mr Hoecker said most Germans were blissfully unaware of the English stereotype of them hogging loungers.
